name: Sour Cream Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water and chicken broth in a covered pan. Add the potatoes, celery, and onion. Cook until very tender.
2. Do not drain the vegetables.
3. Press through a sieve into a bowl, reserving the liquid.
4. Return the reserved liquid to the pan. Add the milk and butter. Stir well.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the sour cream with flour until smooth.
6. Gradually add the sour cream mixture to the soup, stirring constantly. Cook until thickened.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve 6 portions.
